name: Alemana
notes:
May also be commenced in Open Position.
Gold: Alemana may be danced with R to R hand hold.
Finishing positions: Man and Lady end to side; Man and Lady end diagonally forward in Open CPP; Lady ends forward toward Man's right side; Man may turn up to 1/4 R over counts 8-10 adjusting Lady's turn.

steps.action: Step forward with left foot, no turn

comments: Man raises his L arm, table through elbow while Lady turns.
Compact chasses to left, right, left.

steps.action: Compact chasse RLR ending in Closed Position
comments: Lady completes a full turn to the right.
Man may turn up to 1/4 R over counts 8-10 adjusting Lady's turn.

steps.action: Close RF to LF, no turn (starting from Fan Position)
comments: Start from Fan Position; in Open Position dance as back step.
Fast knee switch; compress R side; left knee drapes over right knee.
Shift weight and prepare for lock.

steps.action: Fwd lock RLR, 1/8 turn to R
comments: Lock under raised arms LRLRL, ending in Closed Position.
Turn 1/8 to the right between count & and 1.
Man's left hand may hint at Hockey Stick vs Alemana.

steps.action: Two forward steps and a forward lock under raised arms
comments: Lady may use Extended Forward Walk on count 6.

steps.action: Finishing step toward partner's right side
comments: Man turns body slightly right on step 8 to lead.
Lady ends forward toward man's right side.
Man's RF moves forward in line with LF into forward lock toward Lady's right side.
